per_question.objective_ref: LO1 — Use print() to display values, variables, and multiple arguments
LO2 — Apply core string operations: indexing s[0]
LO3 — Perform integer arithmetic including floor division //
LO4 — Describe why 0.1 + 0.2 does not equal 0.3
LO5 — Combine booleans with and, or, not
LO6 — Convert between types using str(), int(), float(), bool()

length_bias_check.notes: Correct answer is not the longest in any of the 6 questions; all correct/mean ratios < 1.20
